creator: seanbru@yahoo-inc.com
text:
Ugh, so this is a trivial one, I've come up with a patch that I just
tested and it works.

However, the deal is that devel/libnotify removed
notify_notification_attach_to_status_icon support in version 0.7.0

I'm surprised nobody noticed this, but whatever.  I'm not clear how to
implement a library dependency check on libnotify >= 0.7.0 to fix this.

I've attached a patch that demonstrates the example code to be excised.

Note that when this patch is applied the status applet starts working
again.  

Sean
